meta.title: A1 Review
meta.description: A comprehensive review of all A1 topics: greetings, numbers, colors, family, food, places, days, body, animals, classroom, shopping, weather, emotions, home, transport, hobbies, months, jobs, and sports.
meta.description_ko: A1 전체 주제 종합 복습: 인사, 숫자, 색깔, 가족, 음식, 장소, 요일, 신체, 동물, 교실, 쇼핑, 날씨, 감정, 집, 교통, 취미, 월, 직업, 스포츠.

questions.prompt: 처음 만난 사람에게 하는 인사는? (U01)

explanation.en: 'Nice to meet you!' is said when meeting someone for the first time.
explanation.ko: 'Nice to meet you!'는 처음 만날 때 하는 인사입니다.

questions.prompt: There are _____ days in a week. (일주일은 ___ 일입니다.) (U02)

explanation.en: There are 7 days in a week: Monday through Sunday.

questions.prompt: 'It is a red circle.'에서 어순이 올바른 이유는? (U03)
choices: 관사 + 색깔 형용사 + 모양 명사 순서

explanation.en: Correct order: article(a) + colour adjective(red) + shape noun(circle).
explanation.ko: 올바른 순서: 관사(a) + 색깔 형용사(red) + 모양 명사(circle).

questions.prompt: 빈칸에 알맞은 것은? 'There _____ four people in my family.' (U04)

explanation.en: 'There are' is used with plural nouns. 'Four people' is plural.
explanation.ko: 'There are'는 복수 명사와 함께 사용합니다. 'four people'는 복수입니다.

questions.prompt: 식사 순서로 올바른 것은? (U05)

explanation.en: Correct order: breakfast (morning) → lunch (midday) → dinner (evening).

questions.prompt: Turn _____ at the corner. Then go straight. (모퉁이에서 오른쪽으로 도세요. 그리고 직진하세요.) (U06)

explanation.en: 'Turn right' means to change direction to the right.

questions.prompt: 'I go to school _____ Monday.'에서 빈칸에 알맞은 전치사는? (U07)

explanation.en: 'On' is used with days of the week: 'on Monday', 'on Friday'.

questions.prompt: 'I have a headache.'에서 'headache'의 뜻은? (U08)

explanation.en: 'Headache' = pain in the head. 두통.

questions.prompt: 다음 중 'wild animal(야생동물)'인 것은? (U09)

explanation.en: A tiger is a wild animal. Dogs, cats, and rabbits are typically pets.

questions.prompt: Can I _____ a question? (질문해도 될까요?) (U10)

explanation.en: 'Ask a question' is the correct collocation.
explanation.ko: 질문을 하다는 'ask a question'이 올바른 표현입니다.

questions.prompt: 쇼핑할 때 옷을 입어보고 싶을 때 쓰는 표현은? (U11)

explanation.en: 'Can I try this on?' is used to ask permission to try on clothing.
explanation.ko: 'Can I try this on?'은 옷을 입어봐도 되냐고 묻는 표현입니다.

questions.prompt: 'It is raining.'과 같은 뜻의 표현은? (U12)

explanation.en: 'It is raining' (현재진행) = 'It is rainy' (형용사). Both describe current rain.
explanation.ko: 'It is raining'과 'It is rainy'는 같은 의미입니다.

questions.prompt: 'happy'의 반대말은? (U13)

explanation.en: The opposite of 'happy' is 'sad'.

questions.prompt: I brush my teeth in the _____. (나는 욕실에서 이를 닦습니다.) (U14)

explanation.en: We brush our teeth in the bathroom.

questions.prompt: 'I go to work _____ subway.'에서 빈칸에 알맞은 전치사는? (U15)

explanation.en: 'By + transport' = how you travel. 'By subway', 'by bus', 'by car'.

questions.prompt: 'enjoy' 다음에 오는 형태는? (U16)

explanation.en: 'Enjoy' is always followed by a gerund: 'enjoy swimming', 'enjoy reading'.

questions.prompt: My birthday is _____ March. (내 생일은 3월입니다.) (U17)

explanation.en: 'In' is used before months: 'in March', 'in December'.

questions.prompt: 'What do you do?'는 무엇을 묻는 표현인가요? (U18)

explanation.en: 'What do you do?' is a standard way to ask about someone's job/profession.
explanation.ko: 'What do you do?'는 직업을 묻는 표준 표현입니다.

questions.prompt: 'play', 'go', 'do' 중 'yoga'와 함께 쓰는 동사는? (U19)

explanation.en: 'Do yoga' is correct. We 'do' yoga, martial arts, and gymnastics.
explanation.ko: 'do yoga'가 올바릅니다. 요가, 무술, 체조는 'do'로 표현합니다.

questions.prompt: 다음 단어를 올바른 순서로 배열하세요. (종합)
questions.answer: My name is Kim and I am a teacher.

explanation.en: This combines a self-introduction (name) with a job description.

questions.prompt: 다음 문장에서 틀린 부분을 찾으세요: 'She have a big family.'

explanation.en: 'She' is 3rd person singular → 'has', not 'have'.

questions.prompt: 다음 중 전치사 사용이 모두 올바른 문장은?
choices: I go to school in bus on Monday.
I go to school by bus on Monday.
I go to school by bus in Monday.
I go to school on bus by Monday.

explanation.en: 'By bus' (transport) + 'on Monday' (day of week) are the correct prepositions.

questions.prompt: 다음 중 'in'을 사용하는 경우가 아닌 것은?

explanation.en: 'In Monday' is wrong. Use 'on Monday'. 'In' is for times of day, months, seasons.
explanation.ko: 'in Monday'는 틀립니다. 'on Monday'가 맞습니다. 'in'은 시간대, 월, 계절 앞에 씁니다.

questions.prompt: A: What's the weather like? B: It's _____. You should bring an umbrella. (우산을 가져와야 합니다.)

explanation.en: An umbrella is needed when it is rainy.
explanation.ko: 우산이 필요한 날씨는 비가 오는(rainy) 날입니다.

questions.prompt: 다음 A1 수준의 자기소개 중 올바른 문장으로만 이루어진 것은?
choices: My name is Mia. I am have 20 years old. I likes reading.
My name is Mia. I am 20 years old. I like reading.
My name is Mia. I am 20 years old. I likes reading.
My name Mia. I am 20 years old. I like reading.

explanation.en: Correct: 'My name is Mia.' (verb 'is') / 'I am 20 years old.' (no extra 'have') / 'I like reading.' ('I' + base verb).
explanation.ko: 'My name is'(동사 is 필요) / 'I am 20 years old'(have 불필요) / 'I like'(I 뒤 원형)가 모두 올바릅니다.
